alt.zh-TW: SD Multi-Modal Platform demo 錄影，展示 prompt workbench、mock generation、architecture 與 runbook。
alt.en: SD Multi-Modal Platform demo walkthrough showing the prompt workbench, mock generation, architecture, and runbook.

caption.zh-TW: 公開展示用 WebM，使用 mock-safe demo mode 展示無 GPU 也能跑的核心產品流程。
caption.en: A public WebM walkthrough of the mock-safe demo mode that runs without GPU access.

alt.zh-TW: SD Multi-Modal Platform 工作台桌面截圖，顯示 prompt、生成結果、queue 與 assets/history。
alt.en: Desktop screenshot of the SD Multi-Modal Platform workbench with prompt, result, queue, and assets/history panels.

caption.zh-TW: 第一屏直接呈現產品本體，面試官不需要先讀 marketing copy 才知道系統能做什麼。
caption.en: The first viewport shows the product itself so reviewers immediately understand the workflow.

alt.zh-TW: Mock-safe generation 完成狀態，包含 task id、model、mode 與 queue completed 狀態。
alt.en: Completed mock-safe generation state with task id, model, mode, and queue completed status.

caption.zh-TW: Deterministic demo result 讓公開頁、錄影與本機 smoke test 都能穩定重現。
caption.en: The deterministic demo result keeps the public page, walkthrough video, and local smoke tests reproducible.

alt.zh-TW: SD Multi-Modal Platform mobile demo 截圖。
alt.en: Mobile screenshot of the SD Multi-Modal Platform demo.

caption.zh-TW: 公開展示頁在手機視窗也能清楚呈現 prompt workbench 與 health 狀態。
caption.en: The public demo keeps the prompt workbench and health state readable on mobile.

capabilities: Mock-safe demo mode that runs without GPU, model weights, Redis, or external services
FastAPI v1 routers for generation, postprocess, assets, history, queue, models, and health
React + TypeScript workbench with prompt presets, mask workflow, queue monitor, assets, and history
Deterministic txt2img/img2img/inpaint mock generation for smoke tests and public demos
Graceful degradation when optional Redis/Celery/model/postprocess dependencies are missing
Storage discipline for models, caches, outputs, assets, logs, and generated metadata
GitHub Pages static demo with screenshots and WebM walkthrough
